subcodes.first_line: O luminous leaf! Praise be to God, thou hast been nurtured by the sacred Lote-Tree and hast received the bounties of the cloud of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه نوراء الحمد لله از سدره مقدسه روایدی و از ابر میثاق رحمت یافتی و در
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement
